title: 杜麗冰批准律政司的覆核申請 譚文豪須繼續還柙

replies.msg: 【即時】(12:53) 初選47人案，高等法院批准律政司就譚文豪的保釋覆核，譚文豪須繼續還柙。
講野激小小／反抗心大的全部都出唔返哩
飛機師出番黎對仔女仲認唔認得佢

Judge Esther Toh has revoked bail for former Civic Party lawmaker Jeremy Tam. He is remanded in custody.

https://twitter.com/rachel_cheung1/status/1370599177990762502

#BREAKING: Former MP Jeremy Tam DENIED BAIL as High Court judge is not satisfied that he won't commit act endangering national security. The father of two 6yo children will be remanded. The former@civicpartyhk
vice chairman dropped out from the party during hearings last week.

https://twitter.com/phoebe_kongwy/status/1370599283427209223
